data.name: 深淵探索者
data.detailed_description:
After a surprise betrayal from his most trusted mage, the king of Lescardia falls ill from the effect of the mage's curse, and a mysterious labyrinth formed out of darkness subsequently appears in the ruins outside of the city. A few days later, swarms of ferocious monsters begin to emerge from the labyrinth, and the people of Lescardia start to panic as the kingdom is thrown into chaos by the upheaval.

Features


    • Dungeon Crawling RPG

    • Quest System

    • In-Depth Battle System

    • Monster Book

    • Lots and lots of Loot!
data.about_the_game:
After a surprise betrayal from his most trusted mage, the king of Lescardia falls ill from the effect of the mage's curse, and a mysterious labyrinth formed out of darkness subsequently appears in the ruins outside of the city. A few days later, swarms of ferocious monsters begin to emerge from the labyrinth, and the people of Lescardia start to panic as the kingdom is thrown into chaos by the upheaval.

Features


    • Dungeon Crawling RPG

    • Quest System

    • In-Depth Battle System

    • Monster Book

    • Lots and lots of Loot!
data.short_description: After Princess Ovelia's father falls ill, it's now up to her to explore the labyrinth known as "the Abyss" and seek a way to restore order to the kingdom.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 10/8/7/Vista/XP/2000
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows 10/8/7/Vista/XP/2000
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
